headline: IQVIA Holdings (IQV) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: IQVIA (IQV) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
